prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how an HTTP filter factory is registered and instantiated per-connection in envoyproxy/envoy. Find C++ source files implementing: the filter factory registry, the NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory, the filter chain creation, and per-request filter instantiation.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how an HTTP filter factory is registered and instantiated per-connection in envoyproxy/envoy. Find C++ source files implementing: the filter factory registry, the NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory, the filter chain creation, and per-request filter instantiation.
